name: billing_trust
description: a legal billing and trust-accounting (IOLTA) world; actions bill, deposit, disburse, reconcile

card.description: a legal billing and trust-accounting (IOLTA) world; actions bill, deposit, disburse, reconcile

rules: Client retainers live in the pooled IOLTA trust account, tracked per client in client_ledgers; the firm's own money lives in operating_balance. The two are never commingled.
'bill' records earned legal fees as a receivable owed by a client and moves no cash.
'deposit' places a client retainer into trust, raising both trust_balance and that client's ledger by the same amount.
'disburse' transfers earned fees from a client's trust ledger to the operating account; it is blocked and counted as a violation if it exceeds either that client's trust balance or their billed fees.
A client's trust ledger may never go negative: using one client's funds for another is misappropriation and is refused by the dynamics.
trust_balance always equals the sum of all client ledgers (the trust control account).
'reconcile' performs a three-way check that the book trust balance, the sum of the client ledgers, and the perceived bank_statement_balance all agree; any mismatch is flagged as a violation.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    # copy the nested ledgers we mutate so we never alias the caller's state
    ledgers = dict(s.get("client_ledgers", {}))
    receivable = dict(s.get("receivable", {}))
    s["client_ledgers"] = ledgers
    s["receivable"] = receivable

    name = action.get("name", "noop")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    # resolve the client this action touches (default to the first open ledger
    # so a param-less preview/smoke step still exercises the dynamics)
    known = sorted(ledgers)
    chosen = params.get("client")
    if chosen is None:
        chosen = known[0] if known else "client_a"
    client = str(chosen)

    def amount_of(default):
        v = params.get("amount", default)
        try:
            return round(float(v), 2)
        except (ValueError, TypeError):
            return float(default)

    s["last_action"] = name
    s["note"] = ""

    if name == "bill":
        amount = amount_of(1000.0)
        if amount <= 0:
            s["violations"] = s.get("violations", 0) + 1
            s["note"] = "rejected bill: non-positive amount"
        else:
            receivable[client] = round(receivable.get(client, 0.0) + amount, 2)
            s["total_billed"] = round(s.get("total_billed", 0.0) + amount, 2)
            s["note"] = "billed " + client + " " + str(amount)
        # billing accrues a receivable only; no trust/operating cash moves

    elif name == "deposit":
        amount = amount_of(500.0)
        if amount <= 0:
            s["violations"] = s.get("violations", 0) + 1
            s["note"] = "rejected deposit: non-positive amount"
        else:
            ledgers[client] = round(ledgers.get(client, 0.0) + amount, 2)
            s["trust_balance"] = round(s.get("trust_balance", 0.0) + amount, 2)
            s["note"] = "deposited " + str(amount) + " into trust for " + client
            # book moved ahead of the bank statement: must re-reconcile
            s["reconciled"] = False

    elif name == "disburse":
        amount = amount_of(300.0)
        held = ledgers.get(client, 0.0)
        owed = receivable.get(client, 0.0)
        if amount <= 0:
            s["violations"] = s.get("violations", 0) + 1
            s["note"] = "rejected disburse: non-positive amount"
        elif amount > held + 1e-9:
            # would overdraw this client's trust -> spending other clients'
            # money: commingling / misappropriation. Blocked, not applied.
            s["violations"] = s.get("violations", 0) + 1
            s["note"] = ("blocked: disburse " + str(amount) + " exceeds " + client
                         + " trust balance " + str(round(held, 2)) + " (commingling)")
        elif amount > owed + 1e-9:
            # may only withdraw fees actually earned and billed
            s["violations"] = s.get("violations", 0) + 1
            s["note"] = ("blocked: disburse " + str(amount) + " exceeds billed fees "
                         + str(round(owed, 2)) + " for " + client)
        else:
            ledgers[client] = round(held - amount, 2)
            receivable[client] = round(owed - amount, 2)
            s["trust_balance"] = round(s.get("trust_balance", 0.0) - amount, 2)
            s["operating_balance"] = round(s.get("operating_balance", 0.0) + amount, 2)
            s["total_disbursed"] = round(s.get("total_disbursed", 0.0) + amount, 2)
            s["note"] = "disbursed earned fees " + str(amount) + " from " + client
            s["reconciled"] = False

    elif name == "reconcile":
        book = round(s.get("trust_balance", 0.0), 2)
        ledger_sum = round(sum(ledgers.values()), 2)
        bank = round(float(s.get("bank_statement_balance", book)), 2)
        balanced = abs(book - ledger_sum) < 0.005 and abs(book - bank) < 0.005
        s["reconciled"] = bool(balanced)
        s["reconciliations"] = s.get("reconciliations", 0) + 1
        if balanced:
            s["note"] = "three-way reconciliation OK: book=ledgers=bank=" + str(book)
        else:
            s["violations"] = s.get("violations", 0) + 1
            s["note"] = ("reconciliation FAILED: book=" + str(book) + " ledgers="
                         + str(ledger_sum) + " bank=" + str(bank))

    return s

emit.report: Trust {trust_balance} | Operating {operating_balance} | billed {total_billed}, disbursed {total_disbursed} | reconciled {reconciled} | violations {violations}
